推荐场景: 项目会议｜委婉提出反对
60秒任务: 「提出反对」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I see your point, but I’m not fully convinced.（礼貌反对）
I’m concerned that ___.（表达担忧）
That may work in theory, but ___.（理论与现实对比）
I have a different view on this.（不同立场）
Can we look at the downside?（看负面影响）
I’m not against the idea, but the timing worries me.（有限反对）
The risk is that ___.（指出风险）
I’d push back on that assumption.（挑战假设）
Do we have evidence for ___?（要求证据）
This feels too costly for the benefit.（成本收益反对）
Could there be a simpler option?（提出替代）
I agree with the goal, not the approach.（区分目标与方法）
Let’s test that before we commit.（承诺前测试）
I’m not sure the team can absorb this.（团队承载力）
Can we revisit this after more data?（延后决策）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: concern, downside, assumption, evidence, cost, benefit, approach, data
Verbs: disagree, push back, test, commit, revisit, absorb, compare, question
Adjectives / Status: convinced, costly, risky, simple, realistic, premature
Time / Place: in theory, after more data, before launch, in practice, today
Chunks: see your point, not against the idea, push back, simpler option, costly for the benefit
